# Revital Daycare
Last-Modified: 2026-06-28
> Quality preschool and early childhood education in Winnetka, CA. Serving children ages 2-5 with play-based, nurturing care.

## About
- [About Us](https://websitedaycare.pages.dev/about.html): Our story, mission, team, and facility in Winnetka, CA
- [Programs](https://websitedaycare.pages.dev/programs.html): Preschool program details for ages 2-5
- [Gallery](https://websitedaycare.pages.dev/gallery.html): Photos of our classrooms, activities, and special moments
- [Contact](https://websitedaycare.pages.dev/contact.html): Schedule a tour, FAQ, and contact information
- [Privacy Policy](https://websitedaycare.pages.dev/privacy.html): Privacy practices and data handling

## Key Facts
- Location: 20628 Londelius St, Winnetka, CA 91306
- Phone: (818) 943-5983
- Email: revitaldaycare@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 6:30 AM - 6:00 PM
- Founded by Revital Edry
- Ages served: 2-5 years
- Teacher: Revital Edry
- Assistant: Itamar Nadjar
- Ratios: 6:1 preschoolers
- Full-time and part-time enrollment available
- Play-based, child-centered approach inspired by Reggio Emilia principles
- Licensed by California Department of Social Services
- All staff CPR/First Aid certified and background-checked
